textbooks: Data Structures Through C by Yashavant Kanetkar
Data Structures using C by Reema Thareja
viva_expert_tips: Always write the algorithm first, then the code.
Draw clear pointer diagrams for linked list questions.
common_10_mark_questions: Write algorithms for insertion and deletion in a Binary Search Tree.
Explain Circular Queue with implementation in C.

textbooks: Object-Oriented Programming with C++ by Balagurusamy
Let Us C++ by Yashavant Kanetkar
viva_expert_tips: Explain the difference between compile-time and run-time polymorphism with examples.
Always mention 'abstract class' when discussing pure virtual functions.
common_10_mark_questions: Explain all types of Inheritance with suitable C++ examples.
Discuss Polymorphism with real-world analogies and code.
